testsuite.name: com.demo.pom.tests.OptimizedTodoTest

testcase.name: [POM] Agregar tareas, validar lista y eliminar

testsuite.system-out: [POM] ✓ Test pasó. Observa que NINGUNA línea del test menciona 'task-input', 'add-btn' ni 'delete-btn'. Si el HTML cambia, solo actualizamos TodoPage.
testsuite.system-err: mar. 04, 2026 3:46:21 P. M. org.openqa.selenium.devtools.CdpVersionFinder findNearestMatch WARNING: Unable to find CDP implementation matching 145 mar. 04, 2026 3:46:21 P. M. org.openqa.selenium.chromium.ChromiumDriver lambda$new$5 WARNING: Unable to find version of CDP to use for 145.0.3800.82. You may need to include a dependency on a specific version of the CDP using something similar to `org.seleniumhq.selenium:selenium-devtools-v86:4.27.0` where the version ("v86") matches the version of the chromium-based browser you're using and the version number of the artifact is the same as Selenium's.
